name: General Admin / Clerical
resume:
SURNOOR SINGH - Administrative/Clerical/Secretarial Support
surnoorsingh@gmail.com | cell: 672-382-1935 | linkedin.com/in/surnoor-s-14227b177 
4555 Boundary Road, Abbotsford, BC

Profile:
Experienced Administrative, Clerical, and Secretarial professional with a proven ability to thrive in high-pressure environments. Possessing strong problem-solving and communication skills, along with valuable healthcare experience. Seeking a full-time administrative support role at [COMPANY_NAME] as a [JOB_TITLE] to contribute my expertise and dedication to a dynamic team.

Education and Certifications 
Medical Office Administrator (May 2024 - August 2024), Langara College 
● Courses in Medical Terminology, Transcription, Billing, Medical Office Practices and Confidentiality 

Associate of Arts- Criminology Major, 2019-2021, Douglas College, New Westminster 
First Aid I (Completed in June 2023) Red Cross 

Clerical Experience
Medical Secretary at Vancouver General Hospital
● Provide secretarial support in Anatomical Pathology, Hematopathology, and Microbiology
● Utilize CoPath, Sunset, and Smarterm for accessioning, specimen send-out and specimen tracking. 
● Schedule meetings for Drs. - prepare agenda and take minutes when required. 
● Book blood biopsy appointments and coordinate with technologists and associated care units.
● Organize and distribute faxes, emails, mail, and packages.
● Perform set clerical/legal/reporting/billing procedures.
● Filing, retrieving, and shipping FFPE blocks and slides.
● Utilize Excel and MS Word to prepare documents and record data.

Registration Clerk at Place des Arts, Coquitlam August 2022 - Present (22 Months)
(Non-Profit Arts Education and Recreation Center) 
● Verbal and email communication of policies. 
● Front-facing position at the registration desk to help over 100 clients/week. 
● Answer phones to help with client inquiries.
● Utilize ActiveNet for data entry, registration, and booking appointments.
● Collect fee payments, set up monthly recurring payments and use POS system to sell artworks and artisan crafts. 
● Manage inventory of office supplies and first aid supplies - draft Purchasing Order when stocks are low. 
● Assist supervisor with digital preparation, printing, and organizing of attendance books of over 50 teachers for attendance tracking and teacher payments.
● Check enrollment eligibility; assess the need for enrollment override(s). Liaise with programming staff for policy override.
● Liaise with contractors, maintenance staff and janitorial staff for facility needs.

Customer service and communication experience: 
Entrance Screener at BC Cancer 600 W 10th Ave (Employed by Genesis Security) Feb - April 2022
● COVID-19 screenings of over 150-200 patients, visitors, staff, and contract employees as per guidelines issued by BC CDC. Empathetic welcoming communication. Report suspicious behavior. Wayfinding 

Arts Program Leader with North Van Arts (North Vancouver) May 2023 - Dec 2023
● Establish class plans. Develop new didactic material. Deliver beginner and intermediate-level technical watercolor painting instruction to a group of 10 new and returning adult students—live demonstration. Overall, create a welcoming and trusting space for artistic self-exploration and self-expression.

Art Gallery Host at Charles Van Sandwyk Art Gallery (Gastown, Downtown Vancouver) May 2022 - Dec 2023 
● Welcome local and tourist clients, deliver artwork-specific education, and establish lasting relationships through exceptional hospitality. Evaluate stocks, Manage POS system, and create purchase orders.

Sales Associate/ Cashier at Spirit of Howe Liquor Store (Downtown Vancouver) May 2020 - Jan 2022

Languages
Proficient in Punjabi, Hindi and English

Availability
Seeking full-time opportunities. Available for all shift routines.
coverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager at [COMPANY_NAME],

I am writing to express my strong interest in the [JOB_TITLE] position. With a robust background in administrative, clerical, and secretarial roles, particularly as a Secretary at Vancouver General Hospital and a Registration Clerk at Place des Arts, I have developed a proven ability to thrive in high-pressure environments.

My experience spans complex scheduling, high-volume data entry, records management, and exceptional front-facing communication. I am highly organized, proficient with various software systems (including MS Office, ActiveNet, and healthcare databases), and excel at solving problems efficiently.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my dedication and administrative expertise can directly benefit the team at [COMPANY_NAME]. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Surnoor Singh
672-382-1935
surnoorsingh@gmail.com

coverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager at [COMPANY_NAME],

I am submitting my resume for the [JOB_TITLE] position. As an experienced Medical Secretary and recent graduate of the Medical Office Administrator program at Langara College, I understand the critical importance of patient privacy, accurate records management, and maintaining a calm, welcoming environment in a clinical setting.

During my tenure at Vancouver General Hospital, I managed complex scheduling for physicians, utilized medical databases like CoPath and Sunset, and coordinated closely with technologists and care units. Furthermore, my experience performing COVID-19 screenings at BC Cancer has equipped me with empathetic patient communication skills and strict adherence to healthcare guidelines.

I am eager to contribute my specialized skills to your healthcare team. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Surnoor Singh
